name: MatchPoint — Teams Approval Card on Shortlist Ready

parameters.message: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "$schema": "http://adaptivecards.io/schemas/adaptive-card.json", "type": "AdaptiveCard", "version": "1.4", "body": [{ "type": "TextBlock", "size": "Medium", "weight": "Bolder", "text": "🎯 Shortlist Ready for Approval" }, { "type": "FactSet", "facts": [{ "title": "Role", "value": $json.data.jobTitle }, { "title": "Shortlisted", "value": String($json.data.totalShortlisted) + " candidates" }, { "title": "Shortlist ID", "value": String($json.data.shortlistId) }] }], "actions": [{ "type": "Action.OpenUrl", "title": "Review in MatchPoint", "url": $env.MATCHPOINT_APP_URL + "/agent" }] }) }}

_meta.description: Posts an Adaptive Card to a Microsoft Teams channel when an AI shortlist is ready for HR approval. Requires: TEAMS_HR_CHANNEL_ID env var, MATCHPOINT_APP_URL env var, Microsoft Teams credential.
